item.title: Google opens AI centre as Berlin defends US tech reliance
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
German Chancellor Friedrich Merz's coalition has signalled it wants to make progress on the AI front as part of efforts to revive the struggling economy.
Matched: policy(+3), budget(+3), law(+3), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3), funding(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Global aviation under strain as Middle East flight cancellations top 23,000
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Of the 36,000 scheduled flights to or from the Middle East since Feb 28, more than half have been cancelled, according to analytics.
Matched: budget(+3), ministry(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: US stock futures steady as investors weigh Middle East war fallout
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)

item.title: AI giants promise Trump to pay for increased energy needs
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
To develop and use artificial intelligence, the main players in the sector use data centres, whose chips and servers consume a lot of electricity.

item.title: Iran foreign minister: Not seeking ceasefire, warns U.S. invasion would be 'big disaster for them'
item.description:
Source: CNBC Markets (Finance)
Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi told NBC News that the U.S. "has failed to achieve its main goal" by attacking Iran, "which was a clean, rapid victory."
Matched: war(+3), ceasefire(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Japanese bonds draw biggest foreign inflows in four weeks
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Foreign investors bought a net 2.5 trillion yen (US$15.92 billion) in Japanese bonds during the week, the largest since 3.21 trillion yen in the week to Jan 31.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), inflation(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Bank Negara maintains OPR at 2.75%
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The central bank says the current OPR level remains appropriate and supportive of the economy amid price stability.
Matched: policy(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3)
